deep_dive.title: The impact of FRB dispersion measure probability distribution functions on cosmographic estimates
deep_dive.abstract: Recent cosmological observations have reopened the discussion about the model that best describes the dynamics of the Universe, highlighting the need for cosmological model-independent analyses. In this paper, we utilize the cosmographic approach applied to a robust sample of 106 well-localized Fast Radio Bursts (FRBs) within the redshift range $z \le 0.7$ to constrain the Hubble constant $H_0$, the deceleration parameter $q_0$, and the jerk parameter $j_0$. Our primary goal is to assess the impact of intergalactic medium (IGM) inhomogeneities on cosmographic parameter estimation. To this end, we consider the statistical behavior of these parameters under two distinct functional forms for the IGM dispersion measure ($\mathrm{DM_{IGM}}$) probability density function (PDF): a Gaussian distribution (Distribution I) and a quasi-Gaussian distribution (Distribution II) that accounts for the skewed structure of cosmic large-scale environments along the lines of sight. We further investigate the role of the baryon mass fraction by considering both fixed and free-parameter scenarios. We find that the inferred cosmographic constraints, particularly those on $q_0$, depend sensitively on both the assumed IGM distribution and the adopted parameter priors.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: FRB dispersion measure distribution for cosmology
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: FRB色散测量分布用于宇宙学

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper uses 106 well-localized FRBs to constrain cosmological parameters, assessing the impact of IGM inhomogeneities on FRB dispersion measure.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文利用106个精确定位快速射电暴（FRB）的色散测量数据，采用运动学方法约束哈勃常数、减速参数和急动参数，重点研究了星际介质不均匀性对宇宙学参数估计的影响，为FRB作为宇宙学探针提供了重要校准。

quick_skim.title: The Contribution of Disrupted Dense Star Clusters to Gaia's Compact Object Binaries
quick_skim.abstract: We present the first model of the Milky Way's detectable compact object--luminous star binary population from disrupted dense star clusters. We bridge large-scale cosmological star cluster formation with high-resolution dynamical evolution of compact object binaries by mapping the predicted star clusters from the EMP-Pathfinder simulations to $N$-body Cluster Monte Carlo models. We predict that approximately $3\times10^5$ white dwarfs (WDs), $1.5\times10^5$ black holes (BHs), and $1\times10^3$ neutron stars (NSs) in binaries with luminous companions are released to the Galaxy from now-disrupted dense star clusters throughout the history of the Milky Way. Synthetic observations modeled with the gaiamock pipeline reveal that the modeled Gaia DR3 yields are sparse ($\approx 2$ WDs, 0 NS, 0 BHs at 90% credibility), with the majority lying beyond the detection horizon. Gaia DR4 is expected to increase the observational yield of these systems only marginally, as the benefits of an expanded search volume are largely offset by the diminished astrometric and photometric precision of more distant sources ($\approx 14$ WDs, 0 NS, 0 BHs). While the underlying BH binary population is similar to that of WDs, they are detected far less frequently; they tend to pair with lower-mass, dimmer companions and have less temporal coverage of their long orbital periods. For NSs, we suggest that the observed over-representation of metal-poor, halo systems is inconsistent with an origin in disrupted dense star clusters. Instead, the observed Gaia NS population could reflect the accretion history of metal-poor, dwarf galaxies into the Milky Way, isolated binary star evolution, or supernova physics.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: models neutron star binaries from disrupted clusters
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 模拟瓦解星团中的中子星双星
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 模拟瓦解星团中的中子星双星
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 模拟瓦解星团中的中子星双星
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper models the population of compact object binaries (including neutron stars) from disrupted dense star clusters, predicting ~1e3 NS binaries in the Milky Way detectable by Gaia.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文首次模拟了银河系中由瓦解的致密星团释放的可探测致密天体-亮星双星种群，预测了约3e5个白矮星、1.5e5个黑洞和1e3个中子星双星。利用gaiamock管线合成观测，为理解中子星双星的形成和演化提供了重要模型。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文首次模拟了银河系中由瓦解的致密星团释放的可探测致密天体-亮星双星种群，预测了约3e5个白矮星、1.5e5个黑洞和1e3个中子星双星。利用gaiamock管线合成观测，为理解中子星双星的形成和演化提供了重要模型。

quick_skim.title: Detection and luminosity-dependent evolution of the high-energy hump in the Be/X-ray pulsar 1A 1118-61
quick_skim.abstract: Context. Accreting X-ray pulsars exhibit strong luminosity-dependent changes in their broad-band spectra. At high luminosities, their spectra are usually described by a power-law continuum with a high-energy cutoff, whereas low-luminosity observations have revealed a two-hump spectral morphology.   Aims. We aim to trace the luminosity-dependent spectral evolution of the Be/X-ray pulsar 1A 1118-61 and to constrain the luminosity range over which the high-energy hump becomes clearly distinguishable.   Methods. We use dense SRG/ART-XC and Insight-HXMT monitoring, together with three broad-band NuSTAR observations of 1A 1118-61 obtained during its 2026 outburst, to trace the luminosity-dependent evolution of the spectral shape. The ART-XC data follow the decay from a peak luminosity of $\simeq7\times10^{37}$ erg s$^{-1}$ to a low-luminosity plateau at $\simeq(3$-$8)\times10^{35}$ erg s$^{-1}$ in the 4-35 keV band, while the NuSTAR observations provide broad-band spectra during the bright phase, the decline, and the plateau. We describe the continuum with a phenomenological two-component Comptonization model.   Results. As the source faded, the broad-band continuum developed a distinct high-energy hump, giving rise to a two-hump morphology with broad maxima near $\sim$10 keV and $\sim$30-40 keV. The ART-XC monitoring constrains the transition to this morphology to $L_{4-35}\simeq(0.8$-$1.8)\times10^{36}$ erg s$^{-1}$. We also find a break in the luminosity dependence of the flux ratio between the two continuum humps around $L_{4-35}\sim10^{37}$ erg s$^{-1}$. A cyclotron line at $\simeq55$ keV is detected in the high-energy hump, with no significant luminosity dependence of its centroid energy. We discuss this behavior in the context of resonant interactions in the magnetized accretion flow.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Luminosity-dependent spectral evolution of an accreting X-ray pulsar, relevant to neutron star equation of state constraints
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 吸积X射线脉冲星光度依赖的谱演化，与中子星状态方程约束相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 吸积X射线脉冲星光度依赖的谱演化，与中子星状态方程约束相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 吸积X射线脉冲星光度依赖的谱演化，与中子星状态方程约束相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Traces the spectral evolution of Be/X-ray pulsar 1A 1118-61, identifying a high-energy hump that provides luminosity-dependent constraints on neutron star emission models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文利用SRG/ART-XC、Insight-HXMT和NuSTAR数据，追踪Be/X射线脉冲星1A 1118-61在2026年爆发期间的亮度依赖谱演化。研究发现高能峰形态随光度变化，并确定了该特征清晰可辨的光度范围。这些结果有助于理解吸积脉冲星的辐射机制，并为中子星状态方程提供间接约束。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文利用SRG/ART-XC、Insight-HXMT和NuSTAR数据，追踪Be/X射线脉冲星1A 1118-61在2026年爆发期间的亮度依赖谱演化。研究发现高能峰形态随光度变化，并确定了该特征清晰可辨的光度范围。这些结果有助于理解吸积脉冲星的辐射机制，并为中子星状态方程提供间接约束。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 脉冲星、中子星、快速射电暴、状态方程等相关论文, especially work that connects or combines: pulsar timing observations and applications; neutron star equation of state constraints from observations; fast radio burst progenitors and emission mechanisms; magnetar properties and outbursts; pulsar glitch phenomena and neutron star interior; radio pulsar population and evolution; What is the latest research on fast radio bursts and their possible origins?; How does the equation of state of neutron star matter affect pulsar timing measurements?; Recent developments in magnetar observations and their connection to fast radio bursts.

quick_skim.title: Improving low-latency multi-messenger follow-up of neutron star-black hole mergers with mode-by-mode filtering
quick_skim.abstract: Rapid parameter estimation for neutron star-black hole (NSBH) mergers is essential for deciding whether, where, and how electromagnetic facilities should follow up gravitational-wave alerts. Current low-latency analyses typically use only the dominant quadrupole harmonic, leaving strong degeneracies among luminosity distance, inclination, and intrinsic binary parameters. We show that mode-by-mode filtering of the $(2,2)$, $(3,3)$, and $(4,4)$ signal-to-noise-ratio (SNR) time series enables low-latency marginalization over higher-order-mode information at a computational cost comparable to quadrupole-only analyses. Applied to simulated NSBH detections in a LIGO-Virgo network at design sensitivity, our method improves constraints on luminosity distance, viewing angle, localization volume, and source-frame secondary mass, thereby sharpening crucial estimates of electromagnetic detectability and host-galaxy association. We also validate the approach on public data for previously detected NSBH events, finding the largest improvement for the asymmetric, higher-SNR event GW190814.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: mode-by-mode filtering for NSBH mergers enables low-latency parameter estimation relevant to multi-messenger astronomy and neutron star EOS
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 中子星-黑洞并合的低延迟参数估计方法，可用于多信使天文学和中子星状态方程研究
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 中子星-黑洞并合的低延迟参数估计方法，可用于多信使天文学和中子星状态方程研究
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 中子星-黑洞并合的低延迟参数估计方法，可用于多信使天文学和中子星状态方程研究
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper presents a mode-by-mode filtering method for low-latency parameter estimation of neutron star-black hole mergers, enabling the use of higher-order modes to break degeneracies and improve follow-up.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对中子星-黑洞并合的低延迟多信使后续问题，提出逐模式滤波方法，通过利用高阶模态信息打破参数简并，在相近计算成本下改善距离和倾角等参数估计。该方法可应用于未来引力波-电磁联合观测，并为中子星状态方程约束提供技术支持。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对中子星-黑洞并合的低延迟多信使后续问题，提出逐模式滤波方法，通过利用高阶模态信息打破参数简并，在相近计算成本下改善距离和倾角等参数估计。该方法可应用于未来引力波-电磁联合观测，并为中子星状态方程约束提供技术支持。
